serviceDescription: A map service on the www depicting areas designated as Wild and Scenic Rivers. This map service provides display, identification, and analysis tools for determining current boundary information for Forest Service managers, GIS Specialists, and others. The map service uses a File Geodatabase data source with Web Mercator projection. Wild and Scenic Rivers Metadata
